# Walnutt

> Walnutt is a career accelerator for software engineering students in India. We help students become job-ready in an AI world — with clarity, mentorship, and real work to show.

## What We Do

Walnutt gives software engineering students a structured path from college to career. Instead of generic preparation, we start with where the student wants to go — and build the curriculum, mentorship, and portfolio from there.

### How It Works

1. **Assess** — Students take a 30-minute free assessment to see themselves clearly: their strengths, gaps, and realistic career options.
2. **Build** — An AI-powered mentor that never clocks out guides students through a personalized learning path focused on building over consuming.
3. **Prove** — Students finish with real, demonstrable work — not just certificates — that shows up in interviews and job applications.

## Who We Serve

- Software engineering students across Indian colleges
- Students who want clarity about their career direction, not just more content to consume
- Engineers preparing for their first job in an AI-first world

## Our Belief

- Destination before curriculum
- Building over consuming
- Engineering in an AI-first world

## Tagline

"Tell us where you want to go. We build the path from there."

## Get Started

Free 30-minute assessment at https://walnutt.co

## Company

Walnutt is a product by 3P Labs Private Limited.
Contact: hello@walnutt.co
